why_this_action.summary: The highest-leverage do-now move was fixing a false-green Apollo state that was letting launch-ready packet prep masquerade as live outbound measurement.
shared_findings_used: marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: managed outbound still needed truthfulness repair
apollo_sequence_status_latest.json: Apollo was incorrectly treated as measurement-pending live outbound
marketing_2026-05-23_apollo_sequence_launch.json: launch log only proved sequence readiness, not live sending
marketing_2026-05-23_apollo_list_verification.json: non-zero list evidence exists and should remain reusable without being overstated
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now distribution packet existed inside the short-window hold

verification.audit_refresh: marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json regenerated with Apollo no longer counted as active measurement-pending live outbound

notes: Apollo now stays yellow until there is explicit live-send evidence; a non-zero list alone is no longer enough to start the measurement clock.
The canonical audit now reflects that Apollo is launch-ready but still needs send confirmation.
